title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-677)
description: On July 8, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 19.1.2, 19.0.4 and 18.11.7
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 19.1.2, 19.0.4 and 18.11.7
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
